                            title_with_time: '<div class="tw-calendar-event-title" title="MX Lonely">MX Lonely<span class="tw-calendar-event-doors"><span class="calendar-event-time">8:00PM </span></span></div>',
                        },
                    ];
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
        var calendarEl = document.getElementById('calendar');
        var sortbyTime = '20:00 pm';
        calendar = new FullCalendar.Calendar(calendarEl, {
            headerToolbar: {
                left: 'title',
                center: '',
                right: 'today,prev,next'
            },
            firstDay: 0,
            weekMode: 'liquid',
            year: 2026,
            month: 0,
            showNonCurrentDates: false,
            fixedWeekCount: false,
            eventOrder: "sortbyTime",
            validRange: function(nowDate) {
                return {
                    start: nowDate
                };
            },
            events: all_events,
            eventColor: 'rgb(168, 159, 153)',
            timeFormat: 'h:mm TT',
            eventContent: function(arg) {
                return {
                    html: '<div class="fc-event-content-extension">'+ arg.event.extendedProps.imageUrl + '<div class="tw-calendar-event-content">'+ arg.event.extendedProps.title_with_time +'<span class="tw-calendar-venue">' + arg.event.extendedProps.venue + '</span></div></div>'
                }
            },
            eventClick: function (calEvent, jsEvent, view) {
            },
            eventRender: function (event, eventElement) {
                if (event.imageUrl) {
                    eventElement.find('span.fc-event-title').before(jQuery(event.imageUrl));
                }
                if (event.title) {
                    eventElement.attr('title', event.title);
                }
                if (event.venue) {
                    //console.log(event.venue);
                    eventElement.find('span.fc-event-title').after(jQuery(event.venue));
                }
                if (event.start) {
                    eventElement.find("span.fc-event-time").html(event.times);

                }
                if (event.doors) {
                    eventElement.find("span.fc-event-time").prepend('Doors: <span style="text-transform: uppercase;">' + event.doors + '</span><br />');

                }
            }
        });
        calendar.render();
            });

    
</script>

		jQuery('ul#menu-footer li a').each(function( index ) {
			var menu = jQuery(this).text();
			jQuery(this).attr('aria-label', menu+' - Footer Menu').attr('title', menu+' - Footer Menu');
		});
		
		jQuery('ul#menu-social-1 li a').each(function( index ) {
			var menu = jQuery(this).find('span').text();
			jQuery(this).attr('aria-label', menu).attr('title', menu);
		});
		
		
		jQuery('div.ngg-gallery-thumbnail a').each(function( index ) {
			var menu = jQuery(this).attr('title');
			jQuery(this).attr('aria-label', menu).attr('role', 'button');
		});
	});
		
	jQuery(window).load(function(){	
		jQuery('ul.slides li img').each(function( index ) {
			var menu = jQuery(this).attr('title');
			jQuery(this).attr('alt', menu);
		});
		
		jQuery('ol.flex-control-paging li a').each(function( index ) {
			var menu = jQuery(this).text();
			jQuery(this).attr('title', 'Page '+menu).attr('href', 'javascript:;');
		});
	});
</script>
